ogTitle: Mount Adams vs Mount Anketell: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Adams and Mount Anketell.
heading: Mount Adams vs Mount Anketell — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Adams, Western Australia and Mount Anketell, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Adams has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Mount Anketell (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Adams or Mount Anketell safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Adams has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Mount Anketell scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Adams scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Anketell scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Adams or Mount Anketell?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Adams has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
